name: August of August
short_description: An alien spaceship crashes on a frozen planet,bringing the two similar planets together by common interests.Future disasters,friendships made,a tired and hot August...Can it all end well?
detailed_description:
An alien spaceship crashes on a frozen planet,bringing the two similar planets together by common interests.Future disasters,friendships made,a tired and hot August...Can it all end well?
It's a visual novel game.players through the direction key control character walking,Enter key dialogue,Esc archive,Alt+Enter full screen.
It's up to you to watch the replay and whether you can change the ending...Not so much.
